item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, did not fire triage or over-methodize the situation, and provided a practical incident analysis with likely causes and responsibility boundaries for each complaint. It recognized these as distinct count-only incidents rather than treating them as a repeated same-means repair pattern."}
